intro: Angelica sinensis decoction, also known as dong quai, is a traditional Chinese herbal remedy prepared from the roots of the Angelica sinensis plant. This decoction is commonly used to promote women's health, alleviate menstrual cramps and symptoms of menopause, as well as support cardiovascular and immune system functions. However, its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual factors, and it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using angelica sinensis decoction, especially for pregnant or breastfeeding women.
